scripts.build:local:dev-client:android: sh -c 'export JAVA_HOME="/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home" && export ANDROID_HOME="$HOME/Library/Android/sdk" && export ANDROID_SDK_ROOT="$ANDROID_HOME" && export PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools:$ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:$PATH" && eas build --platform android --profile development --local'
scripts.build:local:android: sh -c 'export JAVA_HOME="/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home" && export ANDROID_HOME="$HOME/Library/Android/sdk" && export ANDROID_SDK_ROOT="$ANDROID_HOME" && export PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools:$ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:$PATH" && eas build --platform android --profile production-apk --local'
